calls.name: Adhān
calls.arabic: اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ
calls.transliteration: Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar. Ashhadu an lā ilāha illā-llāh, Ashhadu an lā ilāha illā-llāh. Ashhadu anna Muḥammadan rasūlu-llāh, Ashhadu anna Muḥammadan rasūlu-llāh. Ḥayya ʿalā-ṣ-ṣalāh, Ḥayya ʿalā-ṣ-ṣalāh. Ḥayya ʿalā-l-falāḥ, Ḥayya ʿalā-l-falāḥ. Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar. Lā ilāha illā-llāh.
calls.english: Allah is the Greatest. I bear witness that there is no god but Allah. I bear witness that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah. Come to prayer. Come to success. Allah is the Greatest. There is no god but Allah.

calls.name: Adhān (Fajr)
calls.arabic: اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ، الصَّلَاةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ النَّوْمِ، الصَّلَاةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ النَّوْمِ، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ
calls.transliteration: Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar. Ashhadu an lā ilāha illā-llāh, Ashhadu an lā ilāha illā-llāh. Ashhadu anna Muḥammadan rasūlu-llāh, Ashhadu anna Muḥammadan rasūlu-llāh. Ḥayya ʿalā-ṣ-ṣalāh, Ḥayya ʿalā-ṣ-ṣalāh. Ḥayya ʿalā-l-falāḥ, Ḥayya ʿalā-l-falāḥ. Aṣ-ṣalātu khayrun mina-n-nawm, Aṣ-ṣalātu khayrun mina-n-nawm. Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar. Lā ilāha illā-llāh.
calls.english: Allah is the Greatest. I bear witness that there is no god but Allah. I bear witness that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah. Come to prayer. Come to success. Prayer is better than sleep. Allah is the Greatest. There is no god but Allah.

calls.name: Iqāma
calls.arabic: اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلَاحِ، قَدْ قَامَتِ الصَّلَاةُ، قَدْ قَامَتِ الصَّلَاةُ، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ
calls.transliteration: Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar. Ashhadu an lā ilāha illā-llāh, Ashhadu an lā ilāha illā-llāh. Ashhadu anna Muḥammadan rasūlu-llāh, Ashhadu anna Muḥammadan rasūlu-llāh. Ḥayya ʿalā-ṣ-ṣalāh, Ḥayya ʿalā-ṣ-ṣalāh. Ḥayya ʿalā-l-falāḥ, Ḥayya ʿalā-l-falāḥ. Qad qāmati-ṣ-ṣalāh, Qad qāmati-ṣ-ṣalāh. Allāhu akbar, Allāhu akbar. Lā ilāha illā-llāh.
calls.english: Allah is the Greatest. I bear witness that there is no god but Allah. I bear witness that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah. Come to prayer. Come to success. The prayer has begun. Allah is the Greatest. There is no god but Allah.

calls.name: Boundary du'ā
calls.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
calls.transliteration: Allāhumma anta-s-salām wa minka-s-salām, tabārakta yā dhā-l-jalāli wa-l-ikrām
calls.english: O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, Owner of Majesty and Honour.

calls.name: Istighfār
calls.english: I seek the forgiveness of Allah

calls.name: Āyat al-Kursī
calls.arabic: اللّٰهُ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ، لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ، لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ، مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ، يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ، وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ، وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ، وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا، وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
calls.transliteration: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa-l-Ḥayyu-l-Qayyūm. Lā ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa lā nawm. Lahu mā fi-s-samāwāti wa mā fi-l-arḍ. Man dhā-lladhī yashfaʿu ʿindahu illā bi-idhnih. Yaʿlamu mā bayna aydīhim wa mā khalfahum. Wa lā yuḥīṭūna bi-shay'in min ʿilmihi illā bimā shā'. Wasiʿa kursiyyuhu-s-samāwāti wa-l-arḍ. Wa lā ya'ūduhu ḥifẓuhumā. Wa huwa-l-ʿAliyyu-l-ʿAẓīm.
calls.english: Allah — there is no god but He, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all. Neither drowsiness nor sleep overtakes Him. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what lies before them and what is behind them, and they encompass nothing of His knowledge except what He wills. His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation does not tire Him. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.

calls.name: Tahlīl
calls.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
calls.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā-llāhu waḥdahu lā sharīka lah, lahu-l-mulku wa lahu-l-ḥamd, wa huwa ʿalā kulli shay'in qadīr
calls.english: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. His is the dominion and His is all praise, and He is over all things able.

calls.name: Ṣalawāt
calls.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
calls.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ʿalā Muḥammadin wa ʿalā āli Muḥammad, kamā ṣallayta ʿalā Ibrāhīma wa ʿalā āli Ibrāhīm, innaka Ḥamīdun Majīd
calls.english: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad as You sent blessings upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. Indeed You are Praiseworthy and Glorious.

calls.name: Closing du'ā
calls.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
calls.english: Our Lord, accept this from us. Indeed You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing. (Free supplication, hands raised — istighfār and asking acceptance.)
